requestedAction: Redeploy the dedicated Netlify staging-only site for gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system from main after the AG Digitalz content review merge.
scope: This approval allows AG OS to use Netlify for exactly one staging-only redeploy of the existing dedicated Netlify site ag-social-media-management-system-staging from gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system main at commit 68fee78ecf97c2f84a1bf76ff82658b99ee5f8ce. The allowed live actions are limited to redeploying that staging-only site, verifying the staging URL returns HTTP 200, recording the Netlify deployment result, and stopping before production AG Digitalz/customer domains, custom domain, DNS, paid features, sensitive values, social account connection, social credentials, posting, scheduling, analytics API use, n8n activation, private client data, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution changes.
revocationPath: Expired approval lock blocked or would block the mandatory boot sequence. Original expiration: 2026-07-06T05:55:37Z. This approval is no longer valid for gated actions. Historical proof remains preserved; any future action requires a new scoped owner approval lock.

evidence.reference: Owner-approved orchestrated task granted scoped approval to redeploy the Social Media staging site after the AG Digitalz content review merge.
npm.cmd run dashboard:check, npm.cmd run validate, npm.cmd run boot:check, node --test tests/*.test.mjs, and target repo check/test/build passed before execution.

approvalText: Owner-approved orchestrated task: redeploy the dedicated Netlify staging-only site ag-social-media-management-system-staging after the AG Digitalz content review target PR is merged. Allowed live action: redeploy staging from gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system main at 68fee78ecf97c2f84a1bf76ff82658b99ee5f8ce and verify HTTP 200. Do not create a production AG Digitalz/customer deployment, change DNS, add custom domain, use paid features, store sensitive values, connect social accounts, post, schedule, use analytics API, activate n8n, use private client data, touch Lead Gen, touch AI Receptionist, or change Constitution.
